refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key aspects of worksite mapping that are critical for operational effectiveness and safety: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, detected obstacles, and clearly defined work zones, validated against ground truth or site survey data.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement spatial data processing algorithms for terrain modeling.
DP3: Use geofencing and GIS-based methods for work-zone representation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain mapping and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR with manageable coupling through sensor fusion techniques; modular processing can isolate concerns.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in the worksite environment.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting accuracy of terrain and obstacle models.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy or alternative sensing methods to mitigate sensor failure or data quality issues.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite models, and providing outputs to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution functions.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules such as Teleoperation and Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module centralizes worksite mapping functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; high diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Not suitable for mapping functions; would cause high diffusion and poor containment.
Safety Services consumes mapping data but does not generate it; low containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Dependency on reliable telemetry data from Vehicle module.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment; interfaces are well defined and consistent with known interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's ability to generate accurate worksite models and provide data to planning/execution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with explicit interfaces and ownership.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding redundancy in sensing to mitigate risks.
Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution module.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. All gates pass with manageable risks and clear ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data quality is sufficient for accurate mapping.
NGHE Solution module has capacity to handle processing load.
open_risks: Sensor failure or data noise impacting mapping accuracy.
evidence_needed: Sensor performance data in operational environments.
Prototype NGHE Solution module mapping outputs.
